message:
fix(impact): Cache NetworkSnapshot in ImpactScorer to avoid O(N) re-reads of /proc/net/* during batch scoring.

- fix(test): Add sleep to test_nomock_parse_environ_real_process to resolve race condition where environ is read before populated.
- test(network): Add unit tests for IPv6 address parsing to prevent regression.
- chore: Export NetworkSnapshot from collect module.
